title: Nsuna
description: Nsuna is an on-demand services marketplace that connects customers with trusted local service providers. Customers can browse, book and pay for services in a few taps, while providers manage their schedule, track jobs and grow their business from a single dashboard.

title: Souqna
description: Souqna is a social commerce app that lets sellers spin up a storefront in minutes and shoppers discover products through curated feeds, live drops and reviews from people they trust. Built for fast, mobile-first browsing across the MENA region.

title: Pizzeria Limone
tagline: Order-ahead app for a neighbourhood pizzeria
description: A branded ordering app for Pizzeria Limone, with a custom menu builder, order-ahead pickup, loyalty rewards and integrated card payments. Designed to feel as warm and personal as the restaurant itself.

title: Betsie
description: Betsie is a sports betting companion app that surfaces real-time odds, tracks a user's bet slip across providers, and suggests data-driven picks. Focused on a clean, mobile-first experience that turns a noisy data set into a simple decision.

title: GymProJa
description: GymProJa is a fitness coaching app that pairs members with personal trainers, schedules sessions, tracks workouts and logs progress with charts. Trainers get a coaching dashboard while members get a clean, motivating workout flow.
